title: Buttermilk pancakes
sources: Fannie Farmer, Boston Cooking-School Cook Book (1896) — public domain — pancake recipes.
Marion Harland, Common Sense in the Household (1871) — public domain — early buttermilk pancake recipes.
notes: American buttermilk pancakes — tall, fluffy, weekend breakfast classic. Bicarb-and-buttermilk reaction is the lift. 25 minutes total, batch-cookable, sub-30. The technique-led one: buttermilk substitute if you don't have it, hot pan and a fingertip of water test.
